zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón於大約1249年出生在義大利西西利亞卡坦尼亞時，她的父親Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen19歲，母親Beatrice de Savoie27歲。她於1262年6月13日與Rey Pedro III de Aragón在法國藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特蒙培利也結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1302年4月9日在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿巴薩隆拿享年54歲，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿巴薩隆拿。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón于大约1249年出生在意大利西西利亞卡坦尼亞时，她的父亲Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen19岁，母亲Beatrice de Savoie27岁。她于1262年6月13日与Rey Pedro III de Aragón在法国藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特蒙培利也结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1302年4月9日在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿巴薩隆拿享年54岁，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿巴薩隆拿。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sicilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Franco, Antonio, Attilio, Carmine, Cesare, Dante, Domenico, Giovanni, Matteo, Ornella, Pasquale.  Spanish Miguel, Pedro, Abramo, Carlos, Jose, Mercedes, Seferina.

Italian, Aragonese, and Spanish; Catalan (Sicília): habitational name from the island of Sicily (Sicilia in Latin, Italian, Aragonese, and Spanish; Sicília in Catalan), which was part of the kingdom of Aragon from 1282 to 1713.

variants.name: Siciliano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Rocco, Giovanni, Sal, Domenico, Francesco, Luciano, Nicola, Salvatore, Vito, Amedeo.
Italian: from Siciliano ‘Sicilian’, an adjectival derivative of Sicilia .

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

en.lifeSummary: When Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón was born about 1249, in Catania, Sicily, Italy, her father, Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen, was 19 and her mother, Beatrice de Savoie, was 27. She married Rey Pedro III de Aragón on 13 June 1262, in Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 9 April 1302, in Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain, at the age of 54, and was buried in Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón est née environ 1249, à Catania, Sicile, Italie, son père, Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Savoie, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Rey Pedro III de Aragón le 13 juin 1262, à Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 avril 1302, à Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalunya, Espagne, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalunya, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón um 1249 in Catania, Sizilien, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen 19 und ihre Mutter Beatrice de Savoie 27. Sie hat am 13. Juni 1262 in Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich Rey Pedro III de Aragón geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. April 1302 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalunya, Spanien und wurde in Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalunya, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón è nata il circa 1249 nel Catania, Sicilia, Italia, sua padre, Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Beatrice de Savoie, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Rey Pedro III de Aragón il 13 giugno 1262, nel Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 aprile 1302, nel Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalunya, Spagna, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalunya, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragónが約1249年にイタリアシシリアカタニアで生まれた時，父Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufenは19歳，母Beatrice de Savoieは27歳であった。1262年6月13日にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンheラウルトモントペリールでRey Pedro III de Aragónと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1302年4月9日にスペインカタルニーアバーセロナバーセロナで54歳で死去し，スペインカタルニーアバーセロナバーセロナにて埋葬された。

ko.Villafranca del Panadés, Barcelona, Cata: 스페인 카털니아 바셀나 빌라프랭카 데 펜드e스
ko.Tordehumos, Valladolid, Castilla-Leon, E: 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 발라도리드 토르데모스
ko.lifeSummary: Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón(이)가 대략 1249년 이탈리아 시실리야 카탠이아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice de Savoie(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1262년 6월 13일 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 he라트 몽펠리어에서 Rey Pedro III de Aragón(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1302년 4월 9일 스페인 카털니아 바셀나 바셀나에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카털니아 바셀나 바셀나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón nasceu aproximadamente 1249, em Catania, Sicilia, Itália, seu pai, Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice de Savoie, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Rey Pedro III de Aragón em 13 de junho de 1262, em Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de abril de 1302, em Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalunya, Espanha, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalunya, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón родилась около 1249 г. в местности катаня, сисиля, Италия, её отцу по имени Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Savoie, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rey Pedro III de Aragón 13 июня 1262 г. в местности монтпеллиир, хeраулт, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 9 апреля 1302 г. в местности барселона, барселона, каталуня, Испания в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности барселона, барселона, каталуня, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón nació aproximadamente 1249, en Catania, Sicilia, Italia, su papá, Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Beatrice de Savoie, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Rey Pedro III de Aragón el 13 de junio de 1262, en Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de abril de 1302, en Barcelona, Barcelona, Cataluña, España, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Barcelona, Barcelona, Cataluña, España.
